mapper.delete: DELETE FROM article_like WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT a.article_id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.category_id, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.collect_count, a.comment_count, a.create_time, u.user_id AS author_user_id, u.username AS author_name, u.avatar AS author_avatar, u.role AS author_role, c.name AS category_name FROM article_like al JOIN article a ON al.article_id = a.article_id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.category_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 1 ORDER BY al.create_time DESC
